(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3125D, HHA-230D 

Services for which the sole purpose is to enable the patient to continue residing in their 
home (e.g., cooking, shopping, Meals on Wheels, cleaning, laundry) are excluded from 
home health coverage. 

80.5 - Services Covered Under the End Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) 
Program 
(Rev. 208, Issued: 04-22-15, Effective: 01-01-15, Implementation: 05-11-15)
